summary: Agent-readiness needs focused work before agents can reliably use this project.
recommendations: Add or document setup, test, lint, and typecheck commands.
Improve README and docs so agents can find quickstart, install, and examples.
Add task benchmarks for the top developer workflows agents should complete.
Improve OpenAPI operation descriptions, examples, auth, and error responses.

scoringCaps.reason: Setup or test commands are not verifiable from project scripts.
No realistic agent task benchmark file was found.
One or more key agent-readiness artifacts are shallow or partial.

findings.title: Missing AGENTS.md
findings.description: The repo has no AGENTS.md, so coding agents lack a stable project guide.
evidence: AGENTS.md was not found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Create AGENTS.md with setup, tests, architecture, conventions, and safety rules.
findings.subject: AGENTS.md

findings.title: Missing CLAUDE.md
findings.description: Claude Code users do not have a concise project memory file.
evidence: CLAUDE.md was not found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Add CLAUDE.md with concise workflow, boundaries, and testing expectations.
findings.subject: CLAUDE.md

findings.title: README.md exists, but does not include clear test command
findings.description: A detected agent-facing artifact is missing specific guidance agents need for reliable work.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: test, pnpm test, npm test, pytest, cargo test, go test.
findings.recommendation: Add clear test command to README.md.

findings.title: README.md exists, but does not include architecture or repo map
findings.description: A detected agent-facing artifact is missing specific guidance agents need for reliable work.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: architecture, repo structure, packages/, apps/, src/.
findings.recommendation: Add architecture or repo map to README.md.
findings.subject: README.md

findings.title: README has installation guidance but no verification step
findings.description: Agents need a quick command to verify the project works after installation.
evidence: README does not show an obvious test, build, healthcheck, or smoke-test step after installation.
findings.recommendation: Add a short verification step such as running tests, typecheck, build, or a health command.
findings.subject: README.md

findings.title: README lacks troubleshooting guidance
findings.description: Developer-tool and API projects benefit from troubleshooting notes because agents often need to recover from local setup failures.
evidence: No troubleshooting, debug, FAQ, or common-issue section was detected.
findings.recommendation: Add a short troubleshooting section with common setup and test failure fixes.
findings.subject: README.md

findings.title: Missing llms.txt
findings.description: The project does not expose a compact, machine-readable map for LLMs and agents.
evidence: llms.txt was not found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Create llms.txt with links to README, docs, architecture, examples, and API references.
findings.subject: llms.txt

findings.title: README.md has no examples
findings.description: The README is missing a section agents commonly need to orient themselves.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: example, usage, demo.
findings.recommendation: Add concrete examples showing expected usage and output.
findings.subject: README.md

findings.title: No test script in package.json
findings.description: Agents cannot reliably run test without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "test".
findings.recommendation: Add a package.json "test" script or document the equivalent command clearly.
findings.subject: package.json

findings.title: No lint script in package.json
findings.description: Agents cannot reliably run lint without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "lint".
findings.recommendation: Add a package.json "lint" script or document the equivalent command clearly.
findings.subject: package.json

findings.title: No typecheck script in package.json
findings.description: Agents cannot reliably run typecheck without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "typecheck".
findings.recommendation: Add a package.json "typecheck" script or document the equivalent command clearly.
findings.subject: package.json

evidence: .agentlighthouseignore was not found at the repository root.

findings.title: OpenAPI spec description is too thin for agents
findings.description: The API-level description does not explain product concepts, auth expectations, or common workflows.
evidence: openapi.yaml: info.description is missing or shorter than 40 characters.
findings.recommendation: Add a concise overview of the API domain, common workflows, auth model, and safe usage constraints.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may jump straight to endpoints without understanding product nouns, authentication, or workflow ordering.
findings.fixExample: Describe the main resources, required authentication, common create/list/update flows, and where to find examples.
findings.subject: openapi.yaml

findings.title: OpenAPI authentication is unclear
findings.description: No security scheme or clear authentication guidance was detected.
evidence: openapi.yaml: components.securitySchemes is missing and auth hints were not found.
findings.recommendation: Document the auth scheme, required headers, scopes, and placeholder-safe example credentials.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may generate client code without the required Authorization header or may invent unsafe credential handling.
findings.fixExample: Add an HTTP bearer or API key security scheme and a request example using EXAMPLE_API_KEY.
findings.subject: openapi.yaml

findings.title: OpenAPI server URL is missing
findings.description: Agents need a base URL signal to generate usable client examples.
evidence: openapi.yaml: servers is missing.
findings.recommendation: Add production and sandbox server URLs, or explain how agents should configure the base URL.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may invent a base URL or hardcode the wrong host.
findings.subject: openapi.yaml

findings.title: OpenAPI operations have weak or missing operationIds
findings.description: 1 operation(s) need stronger agent-facing API documentation.
evidence: openapi.yaml: GET /widgets
findings.recommendation: Give every operation a stable, specific operationId such as createWorkspaceInvite or listCustomerInvoices.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may generate confusing client methods or call the wrong endpoint when operation IDs are missing or generic.
findings.fixExample: Use verb+noun names that distinguish similar operations, for example revokeApiKey instead of delete.
findings.subject: GET /widgets

findings.title: Operations lack response examples
findings.description: 1 operation(s) need stronger agent-facing API documentation.
evidence: openapi.yaml: GET /widgets
findings.recommendation: Add response examples for successful and important error cases.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may write incorrect parsing code because expected response shapes are not exemplified.
findings.fixExample: Add 200/201 response examples with IDs, timestamps, pagination cursors, and nested objects.
findings.subject: GET /widgets

findings.title: Operations lack common error responses
findings.description: 1 operation(s) need stronger agent-facing API documentation.
evidence: openapi.yaml: GET /widgets
findings.recommendation: Document likely 400/401/403/404/409/429/500 responses and how callers should recover.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may generate happy-path-only integrations with no auth, retry, or validation recovery.
findings.fixExample: Add 401, 404, 409, and 429 responses with short descriptions and example error payloads.
findings.subject: GET /widgets

findings.title: List operations do not explain pagination
findings.description: 1 operation(s) need stronger agent-facing API documentation.
evidence: openapi.yaml: GET /widgets
findings.recommendation: Document pagination parameters, cursors, limits, and response fields.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may fetch only the first page or invent unsupported pagination parameters.
findings.fixExample: Describe limit and cursor parameters and include a response example with next_cursor.
findings.subject: GET /widgets

findings.title: OpenAPI rate-limit behavior is unclear
findings.description: No 429, Retry-After, or rate-limit guidance was detected.
evidence: No operation mentions 429, Retry-After, or rate limits.
findings.recommendation: Document rate limits and retry behavior for generated clients.
findings.agentFailureMode: A coding agent may create brittle retry loops or ignore throttling responses.
findings.fixExample: Add a 429 response with Retry-After guidance and an example error payload.

findings.title: Missing agent task benchmark file
findings.description: The project has no agentlighthouse.tasks.yaml or benchmark task file.
evidence: No agent task benchmark file was found.
findings.recommendation: Add agentlighthouse.tasks.yaml with realistic, verifiable agent workflows.

findings.recommendation: Use command probes in trusted local or CI environments when you want executable verification.

README.md.contentPreview:
# Sample Widget API

This intentionally imperfect project is used to validate AgentLighthouse.

## Quickstart

Install dependencies and start the server.

```bash
npm install
npm run start
```

TODO: add more complete docs soon.

textByPath.README.md:
# Sample Widget API

This intentionally imperfect project is used to validate AgentLighthouse.

## Quickstart

Install dependencies and start the server.

```bash
npm install
npm run start
```

TODO: add more complete docs soon.
textByPath.docs/overview.md:
# Overview

Sample Widget API is a small demo service. It has partial documentation by design so AgentLighthouse can surface missing test, lint, benchmark, safety, and agent instruction gaps.

The legacy v1 endpoint is deprecated.
textByPath.openapi.yaml:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Sample Widget API
  version: 0.1.0
paths:
  /widgets:
    get:
      summary: List widgets
      description: List widgets available to the current demo user.
      responses:
        "200":
          description: OK
